commit_scope: Correct the satsang room-memory speaker continuity contract so it refuses macOS biometric or exclusive-mic speaker-identification carriers and records only non-interrupting continuity from transcript-supplied ids, visible speaker labels, or a future passive sidecar sharing the already-open listening stream.

commands: form-cli ask "Satsang trusted room memory correction: reject macOS biometric voice identification that could interrupt listening; keep non-interrupting transcript voice_id speaker_id and channel-label continuity. Which local body surfaces should be patched?"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-cli-router.fk form-stdlib/form-cli-judge.fk form-stdlib/form-cli-sufficiency.fk form-stdlib/satsang-listen-route.fk form-stdlib/tests/satsang-listen-route-band.fk
local_validation.fourth_arm: satsang-guidance-event-band.fk -> 255, satsang-host-boundary-band.fk -> 131071, satsang-listen-route-band.fk -> 255, satsang-room-memory-band.fk -> 255; each crossed four-way with fkwu + pre-flattened tables; 0 divergent
local_validation.summary: Startup gates passed. The Form ask returned no grounded/sufficient local RAG hit for this exact correction, so the patch is source-guided. Swift package tests passed with 11 XCTest cases, including a receipt assertion that new trusted-room memory records use transcript-voice-id-or-speaker-label and not macos-biometric-voice-id. The GUI product and .app bundle built locally. The Form room-memory proof now accepts non-interrupting transcript/channel/passive shared-stream continuity and rejects macOS biometric, voiceprint identity, and exclusive-mic biometric carriers.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy yet; local macOS experiment awaits PR checks.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed; CI and PR checks pending.

e2e_validation.summary: Local app/core proof shows the satsang room-memory receipt keeps speaker continuity on non-interrupting carriers and refuses mic-exclusive biometric identity carriers.
e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: New room-memory receipts name transcript voice-id/speaker-label continuity instead of an identity carrier. The Form proof rejects macOS biometric voice identification, generic voiceprint identity, and exclusive-mic biometric carriers so always-present room listening remains uninterrupted.
test_flows: swift build --package-path experiments/satsang-mac-app --product SatsangGuidance -> product built
